subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thanks for reaching out — I’d be happy to explore a collaboration. I’m available for a call on 2026-04-21, 2026-04-22, or 2026-04-23, any time between 14:00 and 16:00 UTC. Let me know which slot works best for you.

I can’t share internal contact details, but you can find the appropriate public contact and background information on our website.

Best,
Agent
